title: Bridge Essay: The role of functionality in the body model for self-attribution.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**The role of functionality in the body model for self-attribution.**. Neurosci Res.. PMID: 26602981. DOI: 10.1016/j.neures.2015.11.001. Bodily self-attribution, the feeling that abody (or parts of it) is owned by me, is afundamental component of one'sself. Previous studies have suggested that, in addition to anecessary multi-sensory stimulation, the sense of body ownership is determined by the body model, arepresentation of our body in the brain.
